user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of leave notification templates showing notification type and description, so that I can review the configured in-app notifications.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see each template's notification type, description, and task showing items 1-6 of 6

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view an individual notification template using the View task action, so that I can inspect the notification content.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I click View on a template row; Then the notification template details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the notification templates list, so that I always see the current set of templates.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the latest templates
